detail.description:
Are you ready for an action-packed multiplayer idle racing game? Train your Champ, improve its stats, get him the best gadget and win the race!

Pocket Champs is a fun multiplayer idle game. Focus your training time on running, flying, or climbing and develop the best strategy before the race. Compete globally against other Champs: who will win the crown?

Running shoes, fins, or pick? Choose the best gadget to give you an edge during the race! Open new chests every day and unlock some legendary
detail.releaseNotes:
Hey, Coaches! We are continuously improving your game experience with bug fixes and changes based on community feedback. Thank you for racing with us!

Please visit the Pocket Champs Hub to learn about current and future game events!
